retrieved_result: CLASSPATH The CLASSPATH tells the Java Virtual Machine and other Java applications and tools where to find the class libraries. The class libraries that the CLASSPATH points to may be the JDK classes (contained in the classes.zip file in the lib folder) and/or any classes that you want to use. Default CLASSPATH
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Java CLASSPATH, not debugging API integrations.
combined_text_for_llm: CLASSPATH The CLASSPATH tells the Java Virtual Machine and other Java applications and tools where to find the class libraries. The class libraries that the CLASSPATH points to may be the JDK classes (contained in the classes.zip file in the lib folder) and/or any classes that you want to use. Default CLASSPA
